description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring a black metal frame and light wood panels. The front side includes a wide drawer above two sliding doors, one of which is white and the other wood-textured, providing a striking visual contrast. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The sides and back are constructed from the same light wood material, framed by the black metal structure, giving it a sturdy yet stylish appearance. The lower section has an open shelf, ideal for additional storage or display. The overall look is clean and functional, making it suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or apartment entryways.
description: A modern cabinet with a black metal frame, light wood panels, a wide drawer, sliding doors, and an open lower shelf. The design is minimalist and functional, with contrasting white and wood finishes on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide drawer, two sliding doors (one white, one wood), and the open lower shelf.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the cabinet, the layered structure of the drawer, doors, and shelf, with no visible handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a continuous wood panel framed by black metal, with no visible openings or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the cabinet's depth and layered construction.
